velvet.name: Velvet

findings: ammo-pouch gate correct (effectively unlimited); values exact. F2 team buff (25.2 casterAtk + 100.8 chargeDmg) stays up on swap shots (plausible 1.068 HOT contributor if swap doesn't full-charge; swapGate:unswapped fix-if-confirmed)

velvet.evidence: Hand-verified vs a real scope-lock run (T5 wind-weak); 1.50 -> 1.05

skill1: Bullet Snatch (battle start + Burst Stage 2): removes 5% ammo from all enemies; fills own ammo pouch to 6,000 rounds.
Full Charge attack while not in Full Burst: expends 100 ammo from the ammo pouch.
skill2: Full Charge attack during Full Burst: expends 300 ammo from the ammo pouch.
Landing 50 normal attacks during Full Burst: expends 300 ammo from the ammo pouch.
burst: Additional Effect (weapon-change spec — VERBATIM TEXT NOT AVAILABLE to this audit; fetch from blablalink: likely carries the swap weapon's charge time / ammo / Full Charge Damage spec that pins the swap shot economy)

caveats: skill2: team buff (ATK 25.2% of caster + Charge Damage 100.8%) is kept alive by SWAPPED shots during her own 10s burst weapon-swap — kit requires a Full Charge attack; unverified whether the swap weapon full-charges (needs footage).

burst: swap shot economy is a materialized parser estimate, not hand-verified — engine fires ~10 swapped shots/10s (60f cycle, no bolt gap) each carrying her SR charge-damage bucket on top of the 7% multiplier.
